title: The Village Age
description: It is a new age for Minecraft village when progress it is your success
body:
# what is the idea of the mod-pack 💡
 In your word you can create your own village and explore other village you can use other mechanics added to easily finish your project.
 
this modpack is recommended to play with other player 
 but remember Minecraft it is a free word you can create whoever you like
 
# features 🌟
there are not any future features because the project is not supported 🚫

maybe if the project is so supported I can't work much more to update it with a new cool features and the new mods.
# requirements 🔥
- RAM (random access memory) 
> Minimum 4Go
> recommended 6Go
- Cpu
> 1 GHz Minimum 
> 3 GHz recommended

**if your PC it is a potato remove much mods you don't like**
